text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond isn't feeling well, so I have her
rest in the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for worrying you. I should feel better
after a little rest...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me, I'm going to take a nap.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Executive
text_block_list.text:
We're pleased to have you here for the
announcement of our latest product.

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Executive
text_block_list.text:
Today, I am proud to announce the latest
innovation from the Satono Group! Introducing
the Virtumusume... Umagine!

text_block_list.name: Umagine
text_block_list.text: Whirrr, clink, clank!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! It's as if 3D polygons have leapt out of
a computer screen and into the real world!

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Executive
text_block_list.text:
Now, try controlling her with our custom double
lever controller!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, is it really okay?
...Here goes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umagine
text_block_list.text: Zooooom!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! She's moving! And she handles like a dream!
Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Executive
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Now, please leave all future races to
Umagine! We'd like you to pilot her!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No way! I simply cannot agree to that!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I will run my own races! I will live up to everyone's
expectations and the Satono family's wishes...
And I'll do it with my own two legs!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hyah?! Was that... just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even if it was, these feelings of mine are real. I
won't stop racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond wakes up from her dream feeling
more energetic than ever!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Would it be better for a robot to run in my place
at my current level?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she can live up to everyone's
expectations better than I can...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Was that... just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But even if it was... Why am I having such
negative thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her nightmare, Satono Diamond
doesn't manage to get enough rest.
